{"headline": "Greater Hope Baptist Church 75th Anniversary \u2014 December 12", "body": "Join us as we celebrate 75 years of Greater Hope Baptist Church. Guest preacher lineup: Rev. Marcus T. Johnson (keynote), Elder Harold Brooks (morning devotion). Order of service: 1) Processional and Call to Worship; 2) Opening Hymn; 3) Scripture Reading and Invocation; 4) Anniversary Choir Selection; 5) Guest Sermon; 6) Offering and Commemorative Book Presentation; 7) Closing Hymn and Benediction.", "category": "anniversary"}
